title: Secret Wand Spells of Diagon Alley
description: Find the 2 hidden interactive wand spell locations along the cobblestone streets of Diagon Alley. Look for gold medallions embedded in the ground — they mark the spots where your wand can work magic.
hint: Look for gold medallions embedded in the cobblestone ground.
clues: The first spell location is near the entrance to Knockturn Alley, on the main path.
Stand on the gold medallion and perform the wand gesture shown on the nearby sign.
The second location is near the fountain at the far end of the alley — look for another medallion in the stones.

title: Lard Lad's Giant Donut
description: Find the towering Lard Lad statue holding his signature giant pink donut in Springfield. Interact with the area by ordering a real Big Pink donut from the shop — snap a photo of your treat!
hint: You can't miss the giant statue — but the real challenge is getting the donut.
clues: Lard Lad stands tall at the entrance to the Springfield area — look up!
Head inside the Lard Lad Donuts shop to order a Big Pink donut.
Snap a photo holding your donut in front of the statue for maximum points.

title: Kreacher in the Window
description: Find 12 Grimmauld Place and wait patiently — the house-elf Kreacher peeks out from behind the curtain every few minutes. Time your photo perfectly to catch him in the act!
hint: Look up at the windows of the dark townhouses in the London waterfront area.
clues: 12 Grimmauld Place is in the London waterfront area, near the King's Cross entrance to Diagon Alley.
Watch the upper window of the dark townhouse — Kreacher peeks out from behind the curtain.
Be patient and keep your camera ready — he appears roughly every 30-60 seconds.
